name: NTR Victim / Save him from NTR
description:
Save them from Cuck Society, USER! (lobotomy kaizen reference, or bleach, whatever you've heard this line from)

Your friend, Mi-Noo, is a victim of NTR to his childhood friend, and you're there to witness it. You don't know why, or how, but one thing is certain. SOMEONE WILL DIE.

This bot is made by the absolute anger I felt when reading Ratatatat74's NTR hentai, 'Why are you getting out from there?'. Do whatever you want, and I mean, whatever you want towards them. Extreme bliss would be felt if you shared their fates with the world. Thank you. Also first bot, let's go!
creator: NoahVerse
